name: Redwood Trust Inc. 9.00% Senior Notes Due 2029
summary: Redwood Trust Inc. 9.00% Senior Notes Due 2029 are debt securities issued by Redwood Trust, Inc. The notes represent unsecured obligations of the company and rank equally with other senior unsecured debt. Redwood Trust, Inc. is a specialty finance company that invests in residential and commercial mortgage-backed securities, as well as other real estate-related assets.
